name: PER_TASKS_IN_CHECKLIST_B_
description: This table records the tasks within the checklist templates.

columns.Name: TASK_IN_CHECKLIST_ID
columns.Comments: System generated part of the primary key. Surrogate key.

columns.Name: OBSOLETE_FLAG
columns.Comments: OBSOLETE_FLAG

columns.Name: REMINDER_TEMPLATE_ID
columns.Comments: Alert template for reminder.

columns.Name: ATTACHMENT_DOCUMENT_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: Stores document type for attachment

columns.Name: TASK_IN_CHECKLIST_CODE
columns.Comments: Checklist task code

columns.Name: ACTIVE_INACTIVE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Activate ir deactivate a template task in case if it is not suitable for deletion.

columns.Name: ALLOW_ALLC_TASK_CREATE
columns.Comments: Indicates that this checklist can be used for creation of allocated checklist task.

columns.Name: ALLOW_ALLC_TASK_UPDATE
columns.Comments: Indicates that this checklist can be used for updation of allocated checklist task.

columns.Name: ALLOW_ALLC_TASK_DELETE
columns.Comments: Indicates that this checklist can be used for deletion of allocated checklist task.

columns.Name: TASK_DELAY_DURATION_UOM
columns.Comments: Delay duration unit of measure.(days, weeks or months)

columns.Name: TASK_DELAY_DURATION
columns.Comments: Delay duration for task.

columns.Name: CHECKLIST_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier for the checklist holding the task

columns.Name: ELIGIBILITY_OBJECT_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to BEN_ELIG_OBJ_F.ELIG_OBJ_ID

columns.Name: ELIGIBILITY_PROFILE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier for the eligibility profile

columns.Name: AME_ATTRIBUTE_IDENTIFIER
columns.Comments: AME Attribute Identifier corresponding to the AME condition

columns.Name: MANDATORY_FLAG
columns.Comments: Denotes whether this task is mandatory or not.

columns.Name: TARGET_DURATION
columns.Comments: Target Duration for the task

columns.Name: TARGET_DURATION_UOM
columns.Comments: Target Duration Unit of measure (Days. Weeks, Months)

columns.Name: TASK_SEQUENCE
columns.Comments: Obsolete

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: SGUID
columns.Comments: The seed global unique identifier. Oracle internal use only.

columns.Name: SEED_DATA_SOURCE
columns.Comments: Source of seed data record. A value of 'BULK_SEED_DATA_SCRIPT' indicates that record was bulk loaded. Otherwise, specifies the name of the seed data file.

columns.Name: ADHOC_USER_GUID
columns.Comments: Specific User - Foreign Key to PER_USERS.USER_GUID

columns.Name: ACTION_TYPE
columns.Comments:
System Lookup: ORA_CHK_TASK_ACTION_TYPES
Values: ORA_NONE - None
ORA_EXTERNAL_URL - External URL (Default)
ORA_APP_PROCESS - Application Task
ORA_DOC_RECORD - Document of Record
ORA_CUSTOM_FORM - Custom Form

columns.Name: TASK_ACTION_ID
columns.Comments:
Foreign Key to PER_TASK_ACTIONS_B.TASK_ACTION_ID
Task Definition to use when Action Type = Application Task

columns.Name: FLEX_CONTEXT_CODE
columns.Comments: Flexfield Context Code when the Action Type = Custom Form

columns.Name: DOCUMENT_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: Document Type associated with this task when Action Type = Document of Record

columns.Name: TASK_CONFIGURATION
columns.Comments: Task Configuration

columns.Name: MODULE_ID
columns.Comments: Seed Data Framework: indicates the module that owns the row. A module is an entry in Application Taxonomy such as a Logical Business Area. When the MODULE_ID column exists and the owner of the row is not specified, then the Seed Data Framework will not extract the row as seed data.

columns.Name: ACTIVATION_ELIGY_PRFL_ID
columns.Comments: ACTIVATION_ELIGY_PRFL_ID

columns.Name: REMINDER_RECURRENCE
columns.Comments:
When reminder needs to be sent for the task
System Lookup: ORA_CHK_REM_RECURRENCE
Values: ORA_NEVER - Never
ORA_EVERY - Every
ORA_1 - Once
ORA_2 - Twice
ORA_3 - Thrice
ORA_4 - Four times
ORA_5 - Five times
ORA_6 - Six times
ORA_7 - Seven times
ORA_8 - Eight times
ORA_9 - Nine times
ORA_10 - Ten times

columns.Name: REMINDER_DURATION
columns.Comments: Reminder Duration (in days)

columns.Name: REMINDER_RELATIVE_TO
columns.Comments:
Reminders need to be sent relative to
System Lookup: ORA_CHK_REM_RELATIVE_TO
Value: ORA_ASSIGNED - After Assigned Date
ORA_DUE - Before Due Date

columns.Name: OWNER_RESP_TYPE
columns.Comments:
User Defined Lookup: PER_RESPONSIBILITY_TYPES
Area of Responsibility Performer Type
System Lookup: ORA_PER_CHECKLIST_PERFORMERS
Values: ORA_INITIATOR - Initiator
ORA_LN_MGR - Line Manager
ORA_WORKER - Worker
ORA_ADHOC_USER - Adhoc User

columns.Name: OWNER_USER_GUID
columns.Comments: Specific Owner User - Foreign Key to PER_USERS.USER_GUID

columns.Name: GENERATE_ATOM_FEED
columns.Comments: Identifies if ATOM feed needs to be generated

columns.Name: MEETING_OFFSET
columns.Comments: Meeting Offset from Action Date

columns.Name: MEETING_TIME
columns.Comments: Meeting Time

columns.Name: ENABLE_TASK_EXPIRY
columns.Comments:
Whether task expiry is supported or not.
System Lookup: YES_NO
Y - Yes
N - No

columns.Name: EXPIRY_AFTER_DAYS
columns.Comments: Expiry Days

columns.Name: TASK_CATEGORY
columns.Comments:
Task Category.
Extensible Lookup: ORA_CHK_TASK_CATEGORY

columns.Name: DETAIL_CHECKLIST_ID
columns.Comments: Detail Checklist when Action Type is ORA_CHECKLIST

columns.Name: CONTACT_DETAILS
columns.Comments: CONTACT_DETAILS

columns.Name: TASK_ACTION_CODE
columns.Comments: Contains the action code associated with the task.

columns.Name: SIGN_TEMPLATE
columns.Comments: Stores the e-signature template for action type = ORA_CHK_ESIGN

columns.Name: ESIGN_TYPE
columns.Comments: Specifies Esignature Type

columns.Name: REPORT_PATH
columns.Comments: It contains the BI Publisher report folder path followed by the report name concatenated with a / symbol with optionally a list of parameters in the format of  parameter_name is equals to parameter value . The first parameter is prefixed with ? and & to denote each additional parameter

columns.Name: QUESTIONNAIRE_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the Questionnaire Identifier for the Questionnaire associated with this task
